title: Built-in Active Directory Guest account is enabled
remediation:
1. Review the list of exposed entities to discover if there is a Guest account which is enabled.
2. Take appropriate action on those accounts by disabling the account.
remediationImpact: The Guest account is a built-in, non-nominative account that allows anonymous access to Active Directory. Enabling this account permits access to the domain without requiring a password, potentially posing a security threat.
